notes.pricing: Most product prices are not publicly visible on the WooCommerce category/listing pages. Only 3 packs have confirmed prices (4400, 5400, 8400 MAD). Prices must be requested directly or require adding to cart.
notes.image_note: All image URLs are WordPress CDN URLs. To get full-resolution version, remove the dimension suffix (e.g. -430x430) from the filename before the extension.
